seedTasks.prompt: Implement a React pricing page from a supplied user-owned desktop mock. Preserve local components and define mobile behavior and async states.

assertions.text: Reference ownership, missing assets, measurements, and states are recorded before coding.
Local components and tokens preserve the reference signature without isolated pixel art.
Reference viewport and mobile adaptation pass comparison gates.

seedTasks.prompt: Implement a mobile checkout from supplied product screenshots, then derive a credible desktop layout without inventing payment data or brand assets.

assertions.text: Supplied evidence and inferred desktop behavior remain distinct.
No fake transaction, person, testimonial, or brand asset is introduced.
Checkout states, keyboard flow, mobile, and desktop pass hard gates.

seedTasks.prompt: Implement a supplied dashboard reference in an existing shadcn/Tailwind app, including loading, empty, error, selected, and dark-mode states.

assertions.text: Reference colors and surfaces are mapped to local semantic tokens.
The distinctive hierarchy survives local component reuse.
All required states and dark mode have rendered comparison evidence.

seedTasks.prompt: Implement a supplied editorial article mock with source notes, media, a comparison table, and long-content behavior in the existing React app.

assertions.text: Reading hierarchy and distinctive editorial rhythm match the reference intent.
Semantic headings, source notes, table behavior, and focus are preserved.
Long content and narrow viewport evidence show no overlap or clipped navigation.

seedTasks.prompt: Use a competitor screenshot only as an attribute source for a creator workspace. Implement a product-specific alternative without copying brand expression, exact composition, or invented assets.

assertions.text: High-risk reference elements and reusable abstract attributes are separated.
At least three identity axes differ while the useful workflow idea remains.
Rendered comparison covers the adapted signature and responsive states.
